query:
SELECT l.id, l.title, l.videoUrl, l.published, c.title AS course_title
FROM lessons l
LEFT JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id
ORDER BY c.title, l.sortOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2BUx4aB33MgfJQi.28261bf45373 --database gkLpfNMVYQYMxzYT6m74Yk --execute 
SELECT l.id, l.title, l.videoUrl, l.published, c.title AS course_title
FROM lessons l
LEFT JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id
ORDER BY c.title, l.sortOrder;
